title: Business Card
description: React project where I tested how to work with animations based on mouse movement, and learned how to use masks in CSS. On the example I made a Sherlock Holmes style business card

title: Be The Hero
description: Project developed by Rocketseat for a ReactJS course. The objective in this project is connect NGOs with people who are willing to make a difference - The Heroes.

title: Ecoleta
description: Project developed by Rocketseat for a ReactJS course. The objective in this project is create a network fo recyclable material collection points, so it will be easy to find one next time you need.
